text.title: test-property-based-llm-invariants Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for test-property-based-llm-invariants as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent emits a "property" that asserts the same thing as an example test on random data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without an algebraic relationship, random inputs add runtime cost without finding edge cases.

failure-mode.description: Agent fixes a failing property by weakening the assertion until it passes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Weakening turns a real bug report into a tautology; the bug remains, the test goes silent.
